Home Headings Links

Keyboard Trap Test Page

This page opens a modal dialog on load. The modal's JavaScript intercepts Tab and Shift+Tab to keep focus trapped between the email field and the subscribe button, preventing the user from tabbing to the navigation links above.

Total focusable elements: 3 nav links + 2 modal controls = 5 (above the detection threshold of 3). The trap cycles through only 2 unique elements (below the threshold of 3), which should trigger the "Potential keyboard trap detected" finding.
